2019.comments: Just made it official. I’m down on my knee.. will you be mine?

2023.comments: Only if my IDP doesn't go at 5.11. Don't take this if a safety goes ahead of you please.

2024.comments: OK, let's finalize this. No extra 5th for me.
Extend Cook 2 years prior to exchange please.
Cut Dugger cap free and replace with Bates for same price.

2014.comments: Historical correction: Ryan Bousquet (Ulterior Warrior) instructed Eric Mannila (The Baster) to make the pick on his behalf due to draft-day technical issues; trade formalized immediately.
